c.d: The number of active users on the platform, indicating its popularity and reach.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Company Reports

c.d: The maximum number of contacts to whom a message can be broadcast simultaneously.
The operating systems and devices on which the app is available (e.g., iOS, Android, Web).
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Company Website

c.d: The ability to customize messages with placeholders for recipient-specific information.
The price of using the app, including any subscription fees or in-app purchases.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Company Pricing Pages

c.d: The presence of security measures such as end-to-end encryption to protect user data.
The ability to integrate with other platforms or services, such as CRM systems or email marketing tools.
Feedback and ratings from users regarding their experience with the app.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, User Review Aggregators

c.d: The availability and quality of customer support services provided by the app developers.
The ability to schedule messages to be sent at a later time or date.
